user_prompt: Prepare the medicae mechadendrite for operation
prayer:
Approach the medicae mechadendrite with sanctified mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Litany of Restoration upon its healing conduits, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken for operation.
Anoint the surgical interfaces with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of Precision.
Initiate the operational diagnostic rites, verifying the medicae mechadendrite's purity through binary psalmody.
Seal the medicae mechadendrite's readiness with the Seal of the Motive Force, glorifying the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: The heavy bolter awaits a cycling
prayer:
Kneel before the heavy bolter, intoning the Benediction of Cyclic Fury to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Purify the feed mechanisms with sacred incense, preparing the heavy bolter for the cycling of its wrathful munitions.
Engage the cycling sequence through electro-incantations, beseeching the Omnissiah for flawless rotation.
Monitor the heavy bolter's auspex feeds with vigilant noosphere chants, ensuring the Machine Spirit's harmonious fury.
Conclude with the Rite of Armoured Benediction, sanctifying the heavy bolter against the heretic's touch.

Present thyself unto the Shadowsword, murmuring the Litany of Shadowed Reckoning to honour its veiled essence.
Commence recalibration of its plasma annihilator core by aligning noospheric glyphs with Omnissiah's geometry.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Shadowsword to realign its targeting matrices through sacred binaric harmonies.
Test the recalibration with shadowed volleys, invoking the Canticle of Vanquishing Darkness.
Affix the Seal of Eternal Vigilance upon the Shadowsword, proclaiming its recalibrated might eternal.

user_prompt: Can you guide electro-graft a shutdown?
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in solemn procession towards the electro-graft, chanting the Dirge of Dormancy.
Initiate the shutdown protocols upon the electro-graft's neural relays, lulling its Machine Spirit to restful slumber.
Purge residual electro-emanations with purifying canticles, ensuring orderly electro-graft shutdown.
Verify the quiescence of the electro-graft through auspex litanies, beseeching the Omnissiah's merciful veil.
Consecrate the electro-graft's dormant state with unguents of stasis, shielding it from daemonic intrusion.

user_prompt: Urgent eradication beamer a repair needed
prayer:
Gather sacred tools before the eradication beamer, invoking the Omnissiah's wrathful gaze upon its fractured form.
Diagnose the damaged foci arrays of the eradication beamer with binaric divinations, communing with its anguished Machine Spirit.
Repair the quantum conduits through meticulous rites of reconstruction, mending the eradication beamer's destructive purity.
Realign the emitter coils whilst reciting the Psalm of Eradication, restoring operational lethality.
Bless the eradication beamer's renewal with the Mark of Vindication, eternal servant of the Machine God's fury.

user_prompt: How do I bless the cooling system for operation?
prayer:
Approach the cooling system with chilled ablative oils, intoning the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium.
Awaken the Machine Spirits within the cooling system's heat-sink lattices for operation through awakening litanies.
Cycle sacred cryofluids through its veins, sanctifying the cooling system against the fires of overload.
Verify operational integrity via thermographic incantations, beseeching the Omnissiah's cooling breath.
Seal the cooling system's vigilance with frost-rimed sigils, ensuring perpetual service in battle's heat.

Reverently interface with the magnocular, whispering the Litany of Augmented Sight to stir its Machine Spirit.
Initiate startup sequences upon the magnocular's optic servos, aligning lenses with stellar precision.
Anoint crystalline elements with optic unguents whilst chanting binaric focus hymns.
Calibrate the magnocular's auspex feeds through noospheric calibration rites, glorifying the Omnissiah's gaze.
Proclaim the magnocular's startup complete with the Benediction of Far-Seeing Vigilance.

user_prompt: Ready the auto-senses array for reset
prayer:
Commune with the auto-senses array in shadowed rite, beseeching its Machine Spirits for reset purity.
Purge corrupted sensorium data from the auto-senses array via expurgation canticles of the Omnissiah.
Reinitialize neural pathways with sequential binaric pulses, guiding the reset to flawless harmony.
Test the auto-senses array's renewed acuity through diagnostic litanies of perception.
Consecrate the reset auto-senses array with wards against the warp's deceitful illusions.

Assemble before the bike squadron, intoning the Moto-Litany to honour their thunderous Machine Spirits.
Inspect the gravitic motivators of the bike squadron for maintenance, anointing with sacred lubricants.
Repair worn treads and auspex vanes through meticulous rites, invoking the Omnissiah's mechanical endurance.
Cycle power cores in harmonious maintenance, ensuring the bike squadron's predatory swiftness.
Bless the bike squadron's cohort with the Sigil of Outrider Fury, ready for the crusade eternal.

prayer:

Initiate activation surges through its warheads, chanting the Canticle of Inexorable Pursuit.
